ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the competition took place */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport or type of competition (e.g., track, basketball) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the competition takes place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the competition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the competition */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organization or entity organizing the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_sport FOREIGN KEY ("sport") REFERENCES sports ("sport_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade level of the athlete (e.g., JR, SO, SR) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the athlete in team sports */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the athlete (e.g., healthy, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "school" TEXT /* School or institution the team represents */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach leading the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium or home venue of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete participating in the competition */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event in which the athlete participated */,
  "time" REAL /* Time or score achieved by the athlete */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score or points earned by the athlete */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Place or rank achieved by the athlete */,
  "performance_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the athlete's performance (e.g., splits, technique notes) */,
  "qualification_status" TEXT /* Whether the athlete qualified for the next round or event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "min_participants" INTEGER /* Minimum number of participants required for the sport */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed for the sport */,
  "scoring_system" TEXT /* Description of the scoring system used in the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., 100m dash, high jump) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., individual, team) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the event (e.g., rules, format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, athlete) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission or access right granted to the user */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of data the user can view (e.g., all, team, athlete) */,
  "edit_type" TEXT /* Type of data the user can edit (e.g., results, profiles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role")
)
